data.name: Hentai Girls: Lust [18+]
data.detailed_description:
Only in this game will you find AAA-quality anime nude pictures, sensual female moans, several characters, various puzzle mechanics, leaderboards, a stylish animated design, romantic music, a gallery, and 100 achievements 💦

Prepare for resistance! Now, the girls are not only beautiful, but also cunning—they will hinder you by scrambling the puzzle pieces 👿

There are also several characters whose thoughts are expressed through emojis.

Can you figure out what they’re thinking? 🤔💭

Instructions

Your goal is to restore the picture by swapping and flipping the pieces.

Key Features

  • AAA-quality anime nude pictures

  • Visual novel elements

  • Several characters whose thoughts are expressed using emoji

  • Sensual female moans

  • Leaderboards

  • Gallery

  • Two difficulty levels and a "Classic" mode (without an opponent)

  • Cheat (F key), available only in "Classic" mode, not recorded in leaderboards

  • Mini-games

  • Zoom (you can see every detail!)

  • High-quality design (interface, animations, and effects)

  • Romantic music for relaxation

  • 100 achievements: alphabet, numbers, and symbols (for customizing your Steam profile)

  • Can be played with one hand

Achievement Showcase

(will be available later, after Steam approval)

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2.4 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 11
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
